attacking_style: Not an attacker. Functions as a lead-out rider for sprinters, tasked with high-speed positioning work in the final kilometers before the sprint.
team_tactics: Deployed as primary domestique for sprint lead-out (specifically for EWAN). Expected to maintain tempo and chase down moves in final 2km, even when isolated.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finishes where his lead-out capabilities are utilized. Exposed when team numbers are depleted and sustained wind-taking is required.
vulnerability: Collapses when forced into extended solo chase work without team rotation. Seven-rider team formats leave him critically isolated before key sprint positioning phase begins.
key_patterns: Sacrifices own sprint chances to perform lead-out duties for team sprinter EWAN.
Struggles to maintain effectiveness when isolated without teammates to share wind-taking rotation.
Compromised in reduced team formats where domestique depth is insufficient for proper sprint train.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows tactical role vulnerability rather than individual form indicators
